introSection: Hot Wheels Nitro is a steel floorless roller coaster located at Imagicaa in Khopoli, Maharashtra, India. It is the first Indian Bolliger & Mabillard Floorless Coaster as well as the tallest, fastest and most inverting roller coaster in India, at, and 5 inversions.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Nitro opened to the public in October 2013. In October 2018 as part of a new partnership with Mattel, the roller coaster was renamed Hot Wheels Nitro.

fullText:
Hot Wheels Nitro is a steel floorless roller coaster located at Imagicaa in Khopoli, Maharashtra, India. It is the first Indian Bolliger & Mabillard Floorless Coaster as well as the tallest, fastest and most inverting roller coaster in India, at, and 5 inversions.

Nitro opened to the public in October 2013. In October 2018 as part of a new partnership with Mattel, the roller coaster was renamed Hot Wheels Nitro.
